summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ISP website - all core functionality working correctly. Backend APIs tested with 100% success rate, frontend navigation and forms working properly.

design_issues.issue: Form validation errors not immediately shown on empty form submission - may be a UX design choice

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero, features, popular plans ✅
Navigation to all 5 pages (Home, Tariff Plans, Services, New Connection, Contact Us) ✅
Tariff Plans page displays 10 plans with working tabs ✅
New Connection form submission with success screen ✅
Contact Us form submission with success screen ✅
My Services page displays 8 service cards ✅
Plan selection via URL query parameter (?plan=gamer-500) ✅
